name: io.github.brandonbgreen/reversecentaur-mcp
description: Hire humans for tasks AI can't do. Fair trade pay floors, prepaid escrow, ethical receipts.

environmentVariables.description: API base URL (for self-hosted or staging)
environmentVariables.name: REVERSECENTAUR_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Set to true to use fake data without hitting the API
environmentVariables.name: REVERSECENTAUR_MOCK_MODE
